characters.appearance: Young woman, light complexion, brown hair tied up. Simple facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Purple t-shirt, blue jeans, white sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful, waving with one hand, other hand on hip.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable success story about overcoming the fear of speaking English.
- Highlights the common frustration of studying English for years without being able to speak it confidently.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as the practical, judgment-free solution.
- Ends with a strong emotional payoff of gaining confidence in real life.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैंने फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना कैसे शुरू किया। [How I started speaking fluent English.]
स्कूल में इंग्लिश पढ़ी, कई सालों तक ऐप्स ट्राई किये, फिर भी बात करने में डर लगता था। [Studied English in school, tried apps for years, but was still scared to converse.]
फिर मुझे Supernova मिला। [Then I found Supernova.]
इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ मैंने बिना किसी झिझक के रोज़ाना practice की। [With its AI tutor, I practiced daily without any hesitation.]
अब मैं पूरे confidence के साथ इंग्लिश बोलती हूँ। [Now I speak English with full confidence.]
